case_title: FRANCES D. O'SULLIVAN VS. MELLISSA MORGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY O'SULLIVAN, FRANCES D. AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, MELLISSA MORGAN, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (SC-150 FORM STAMPED:"BY FAX");REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, MARK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED MAY-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, MARK
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-01-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-22-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, MELLISSA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MORGAN, MELLISSA MORGAN, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT BUT WERE REPRESENTED BY SHAUNA ANDERSON--CLAIM SPECIALIST SENIOR, PROGRESSIVE INS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'SULLIVAN, FRANCES D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, MELLISSA MORGAN, MARK $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $297.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,497.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT MELLISSA MORGAN MAIL RETURNED: FORWARD TIME EXP
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, MELLISSA MORGAN, MARK
